comments: Another Reading Rock revisited show. Four more great sets from the 1982 Reading Festival.
Bernie Torme’s set features Robert John Godfrey of the Enid on Wild Thing. Bernie had recorded his Electric Gypsies album at the Enid's Lodge Studio with Robert on Keyboards.
Gary Moore’s set has a drum solo from Ian Paice.
Tommy does finish with an extract from Gary Moore’s soundcheck: He calls it Gary “tuning up”...

track_listing.track: Tommy plays out with Gary Moore “tuning up”
